understand_ptd.title: Read the Path to Divinity scroll (Corrupted Knowledge Book) — understand the full Mass Accumulate mechanic

soul_collection.title: Begin Mass Accumulate soul collection — choose whether to pursue the Philosopher's Stone path

subtitle.text: 999 souls. The Divine mod calls this Mass Accumulate. FMA calls it the cost of the Stone. They are the same thing.

description: CH.16 · MASS ACCUMULATE
▸ The Path to Divinity mod requires 999 villager souls
via the Mass Accumulate mechanic.
This is not a grind. It is a choice.
The previous civilization that used Mass Accumulate
was the one that disappeared most completely.
The scroll does not say why. It just describes the mechanic.
You can read the mechanic without using it.
Or you can use it.
◈ MASS ACCUMULATE MECHANICS
└ Soul source: MCA Reborn villagers
(vanilla villagers also count — any humanoid NPC)
└ Mass Accumulate trigger: specific PTD ritual item/block
(check JEI for divine: Mass Accumulate recipe/block)
└ Harvest: 999 villager souls = required batch
This is exactly 999 individual villager kills
└ Soul storage: souls are stored in the Accumulate mechanism
until the threshold is reached
└ Threshold: 999 → enables Homunculus brew
◈ THE CHOICE
└ Option A: Pursue the Stone
Requires: systematically end a civilization of 999 beings
Reward: Philosopher's Stone, divine alchemy, endgame recipes
Cost: your village, your MCA council, your kingdom
└ Option B: Do not pursue the Stone
The pack is completable without it
Ch17 quantum mechanism is the MECHANICAL endgame
PTD is the MORAL endgame — optional layer on top
└ There is no wrong answer mechanically
The choice is about what story you want to tell
◈ IF PURSUING: LOGISTICS
└ Start fresh with a separate village from your MCA kingdom
(preserve your community; harvest a distant settlement)
└ Build a second village → populate → harvest → repeat
(villager breeding produces additional population)
└ Document: write in Book and Quill what you chose and why
The PTD path is a historical act — record it
▸ The Corrupted Knowledge Book that holds the path_divinity scroll
was found below the surface, hidden.
Not displayed. Not taught. Hidden.
The civilization that hid it knew what it was.
They hid it because they had used it.
They were gone before you arrived.
The stone survived them.
Consider what that means.
▶ Read the PTD scroll and understand Mass Accumulate [check]
▶ Make your choice and begin or decline [check]
◇ The Philosopher's Stone recipe (ch16_r_ptd2) is the next quest.
It requires Mass Accumulate complete.
If you chose not to pursue: skip ch16_r_ptd2.
The Ch17 quantum_mechanism path does not require the Stone.
Two different endgames. Same chapter.
